neg_celastrol.reason: mapping ok; warhead present; recruiter absent-by-design; Hyp-pocket unoccupied

active_vs_epimer_paired.wording: epimer passed at 1.000 vs active 0.667 (Δ=+0.333); different rate (within tolerance 0.10? no) → not shown as same rate

pilot_gate.reason: control seats VH032 in VHL (3/3 samples) AND NR4A1 meets the correct-half dual-surface proximity criterion (fraction 0.67 at 4.5 Å). NOTE: this is an architecture-feasibility gate ONLY — not a binding/affinity gate.

full_gate.basis: in ONE retrospective example the correct-half dual-surface proximity classifier (SEED-level) was concordant with the reported phenotype: NR4A1 0.67 of seeds vs NR4A2 0.00 / NR4A3 0.00 at 4.5 Å; robust across 4.0/4.5/5.0 Å; survives leave-one-seed-out; NR4A1 seed-level wrong-end 0.33 (<0.5); architecture controls ok. Architecture-feasibility only; NOT validation, NOT affinity/selectivity.
full_gate.ligand_iptm_note: ligand-iPTM did NOT reproduce the ordering in this benchmark (NR4A1 0.857 vs NR4A2 0.910 / NR4A3 0.876) and must not rank paralogue-selective ternaries alone.
full_gate.not_an_affinity_gate: this is a structure-only architecture-feasibility readout; an inactive stereo-epimer passed it at the active rate — affinity/binding/selectivity ranking requires a SEPARATE affinity method (FEP/ABFE) that first passes the active-vs-epimer control
caveats: retrospective n=1 (NR-V04-inspired representative reconstruction; exact graph unverified)
phenotype does not establish geometry as the cause
no CRL4/E2~Ub; Lys reach demoted; Cys551 not evaluated

correct-half dual-surface proximity is now computed from ATOM-MAPPED chemical moieties (atom_map_moieties; the retired conformation-dependent sulfur-anchor split is no longer used), and it was elevated to primary AFTER the ligand-iPTM result (exploratory ordering)

neg_celastrol.reason: mapping ok; warhead present; recruiter absent-by-design; Hyp-pocket unoccupied

active_vs_epimer_paired.wording: epimer passed at 1.000 vs active 0.667 (Δ=+0.333); different rate (within tolerance 0.10? no) → not shown as same rate
